items.description: Conduct broad research on the concept of WiFi penetration testing, including its purpose and importance.
Identify and summarize common tools used in WiFi penetration testing.
Research techniques and methodologies used in WiFi penetration testing.
Gather information on best practices and ethical considerations in WiFi penetration testing.
Compile findings into a structured report.
